responsibilities: Hold schema validation outcome — errors and warnings
Hold resolved state for a single dependency key
Hold the full resolution outcome for a skill's requirements

functions.name: get_doctor_report
functions.notes: strict_mode=False: missing runtime_requirements -> warning + safe_minimal fallback. strict_mode=True: missing -> error, blocks execution.

functions.name: validate_phase_completion
functions.notes: Phase complete ONLY when: all tasks exist in ledger, all state=completed, verification pass, no active workers/locks, all exit criteria pass. Phase Complete != First Blocking Task Complete.

functions.name: get_next_ready_task
functions.notes: Priority: running -> wait; failed -> recover; ready_queue -> return first; current phase incomplete -> stay; all phases done -> /debug; NEVER /release until all phases + debug + verify pass.

responsibilities: Hold task dependency graph node with state machine
Hold full dependency graph with ready_queue, blocked, failed, completed lists
Hold task progress ledger — source of truth for completion state

functions.name: build_task_graph
functions.notes: DFS cycle check -> CyclicDependencyError. Unknown ref -> UnknownDependencyError. Writes task_graph.json.

functions.name: transition_task_state
functions.notes: Raises ForbiddenStateTransitionError for forbidden shortcuts. completed requires: impl done + outputs exist + verification pass + no worker + no lock.

functions.name: load_task_ledger
functions.notes: Reads tasks.json. Raises LedgerConsistencyError if blueprint task missing.

functions.name: write_task_ledger
functions.notes: Atomic write to .agents/state/workflow/tasks.json.

functions.name: get_next_ready_task
functions.notes: Returns (task_id, reason) or (None, reason). See next-task recommendation rules.

functions.name: read_environment_snapshot
functions.notes: Reads .agents/state/environment.json; never runs CLI checks

functions.name: detect_work_item_cached
functions.notes: Reads from .agents/state/context.json; never scans docs/

functions.name: detect_project_version_cached
functions.notes: Reads version.version from .agents/state/context.json

functions.name: load_memory_cached
functions.notes: Reads ONLY memory-state.json + memory.config.json. Never reads project-summary.md or module memory documents.

functions.name: load_memory_lazy
functions.notes: No query: returns deferred handle, nothing loaded. With query: loads only targeted memory chunks. Never full load.

functions.name: load_memory_required
functions.notes: Allowed ONLY for project-memory-bootstrap and project-memory-update skills.

functions.name: load_rag_cached
functions.notes: Reads RAG metadata/status only. Never connects or queries vector DB.

functions.name: load_rag_lazy
functions.notes: Returns deferred handle; issues RAG query only when query is provided

functions.name: check_workspace_scan_allowed
functions.notes: Blocks if skill is not in WORKSPACE_SCAN_ALLOWED_SKILLS and mode != none

functions.name: load_guardrails_summary
functions.notes: Returns rules, skill name, and policy flags without loading heavy context

functions.name: load_approval_state
functions.notes: Reads .agents/state/approvals.json

functions.name: load_dashboard_state
functions.notes: Reads .agents/state/dashboard.json

memory_mode_semantics.cached: Reads ONLY memory-state.json + memory.config.json metadata. Never reads project-summary.md.
memory_mode_semantics.lazy: No load at init. Targeted load only when skill calls load_memory_lazy(query=...).
memory_mode_semantics.required: Allowed only for memory-specific skills. Loads project-summary.md + named targets.

rag_mode_semantics.cached: Reads RAG metadata/status only. Never connects or queries vector DB.
rag_mode_semantics.lazy: No load at init. Actual query only when skill calls load_rag_lazy(query=...).
rag_mode_semantics.required: Allowed only for project-rag-search. May initialize and query RAG.

version_mode_semantics.cached: Read from .agents/state/context.json version field only. Never scan package.json, go.mod, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml, MANIFEST.json.

provider_mode_semantics.cached: Read provider metadata from context.json or dashboard.json only.
provider_mode_semantics.lazy: Load provider metadata only when explicitly needed.

usage_mode_semantics.cached: Read usage summary from context/usage.json or dashboard.json only. Never parse transcripts.
usage_mode_semantics.lazy: May run incremental usage sync when explicitly requested.

initialize_workflow_hard_rules: provider: optional — read from state if available
usage: cached — never parse transcripts or sync request history

guardrails_summary.notes: Does not weaken rules. Full AI_RULES.md still loaded when skill requires full policy text.

requirements: Fallback to .agents/.session.json only with console warning

database.maintenance_strategy: dependencies.json is overwritten per skill run; environment.json is replaced on /environment-health; task_graph.json and tasks.json updated on each state transition

state_files.update_frequency: built once before implementation; updated on state transitions
atomic write on each task state transition
ledger_rules: AI messages do NOT count as task completion
Checkpoint updates do NOT count as task completion
Blueprint task missing from tasks.json = LedgerConsistencyError
Phase cannot complete while any task is not completed in ledger

invalidation_rules: environment.json: invalidated only by /environment-health or env snapshot command
context.json: invalidated on session restart or checkpoint change
dependencies.json: overwritten on each deps resolve invocation

errors.trigger: A required dependency cannot be resolved
errors.recovery: Print exact dependency name + suggested fix; sys.exit(1)
Print key name + list valid keys; sys.exit(1)
Print mode name + list valid modes; sys.exit(1)

errors.trigger: Skill with workspace_scan: none attempts scan
Cycle detected in task dependency graph
errors.recovery: Print cycle path; block implementation start

errors.trigger: Task dependency references non-existent task ID
errors.recovery: Print bad reference; block implementation start

errors.trigger: Task state transition not in ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS
errors.recovery: Print current/target state + allowed transitions; sys.exit(1)
Print missing task ID; block phase start

steps: Resolver reads environment snapshot (warn if stale)
Print: Cannot run. Blueprint not approved.
Print warning: snapshot is old, run /environment-health

Schema validation result; prints errors and warnings
Scan report for all skills: missing declarations, invalid keys, safety violations
Diff of proposed changes per SKILL.md before writing; requires approval
rules: Must show all affected files and proposed diffs
Must require user approval before writing
After approval: write changes + run deps validate

cli_contracts.output: Current graph state: ready_queue, blocked, completed, phase statuses
Next ready task recommendation with reason

cli_contracts.notes: ONLY command allowed to run CLI version checks

cli_contracts.output: JSON work item from cached context.json

tests.assertion: load_memory_lazy: no load with no query
load_rag_lazy: no load with no query
load_version_cached does NOT scan manifest files
deps doctor: all skills have manifest
deps doctor: legacy skills report warning, not error in non-strict mode
Phase 1 incomplete with only Task 1.1 done
Phase 1 complete only when all phase tasks done
No skipped task passes without approved_skip_reason
Task 1.1 complete but 1.2/1.3 incomplete -> phase blocked
Unknown dependency reference blocks graph creation
Task cannot run before dependencies complete
completed -> running without rerun approval is forbidden
After Task 1.1 complete, next is Task 1.2
Does NOT recommend next phase while current phase incomplete
Does NOT recommend debug while current phase incomplete
Does NOT recommend release before all phases + debug + verify
Reports all affected SKILL.md files before writing
Legacy skill uses safe_minimal fallback, NOT full_preload

acceptance_criteria: Task dependency graph (task_graph.json) exists and is cycle-validated before implementation
Task state machine blocks all invalid transitions (9 forbidden shortcuts enforced)
Phase completion requires ALL phase tasks to be completed with verification pass
get_next_ready_task() recommends next task, not next phase, while current phase is incomplete
No phase can complete after only the first blocking task in that phase
runtime_requirements supports version, provider, usage keys (replacing transcript_sync, provider_usage)
deps fix is defined with approval gate and diff output before writing
initialize-workflow declares version: cached, provider: optional, usage: cached and does NOT perform transcript sync
Tests cover: task graph (5), state machine (4 forbidden + allowed), next task (4), deps fix (4), no-heavy-init (8), phase gate (3)
Every task in the blueprint has a complete implementation contract with phase_id, read_set, write_set, expected_outputs, task_state_inputs, task_state_outputs, verification, rollback
